<style>
.v2docs {
    --v2-bg: #fafafa;
    --v2-fg: #0f172a;
    --v2-muted: #64748b;
    --v2-border: #e2e8f0;
    --v2-accent: #6366f1;
    --v2-success: #10b981;
    --v2-warn: #f59e0b;
    --v2-code-bg: #0b1020;
    --v2-code-fg: #e2e8f0;
    --v2-code-muted: #94a3b8;
    --v2-code-key: #93c5fd;
    --v2-code-str: #86efac;
    --v2-code-num: #fda4af;
    --v2-code-comment: #64748b;
    background: var(--v2-bg);
    color: var(--v2-fg);
    font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif;
    line-height: 1.6;
}
.v2docs .v2-shell { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 240px 1fr; gap: 0; min-height: calc(100vh - 56px); }
@media (max-width: 1100px) { .v2docs .v2-shell { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } .v2docs .v2-side { display: none; } }

.v2docs .v2-side {
    border-right: 1px solid var(--v2-border);
    padding: 24px 0;
    background: #fff;
    position: sticky; top: 56px;
    max-height: calc(100vh - 56px);
    overflow-y: auto;
}
.v2docs .v2-side h6 { font-size: 11px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.06em; color: var(--v2-muted); padding: 0 24px; margin: 16px 0 6px; font-weight: 600; }
.v2docs .v2-side h6:first-child { margin-top: 0; }
.v2docs .v2-side a { display: block; padding: 5px 24px; color: var(--v2-fg); text-decoration: none; font-size: 13.5px; border-left: 2px solid transparent; }
.v2docs .v2-side a:hover { background: #f1f5f9; }
.v2docs .v2-side a.is-active { color: var(--v2-accent); border-left-color: var(--v2-accent); background: #eef2ff; }

.v2docs .v2-main { max-width: 1280px; padding: 56px 56px 120px; }
@media (max-width: 1100px) { .v2docs .v2-main { padding: 32px 24px 80px; } }

.v2docs h1.hero { font-size: 36px; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: -0.02em; margin: 0 0 8px; }
.v2docs .hero-tag { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: 999px; background: #ecfdf5; color: #047857; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; margin-left: 10px; vertical-align: middle; }
.v2docs .hero-sub { color: var(--v2-muted); font-size: 17px; margin: 0 0 36px; }

.v2docs section { padding: 32px 0; border-top: 1px solid var(--v2-border); }
.v2docs section:first-of-type { border-top: none; }
.v2docs h2 { font-size: 26px; font-weight: 700; margin: 0 0 8px; letter-spacing: -0.01em; scroll-margin-top: 80px; }
.v2docs h3 { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; margin: 24px 0 8px; }
.v2docs h4 { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.04em; color: var(--v2-muted); margin: 24px 0 8px; }
.v2docs p { margin: 0 0 12px; }
.v2docs p.lead { font-size: 16px; color: var(--v2-muted); margin: 0 0 20px; }

/* Endpoint signature row */
.v2docs .ep { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 14px 16px; background: #fff; border: 1px solid var(--v2-border); border-radius: 8px; margin-bottom: 16px; font-family: ui-monospace, 'JetBrains Mono', SFMono-Regular, monospace; font-size: 14px; }
.v2docs .ep .method { padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: 4px; font-weight: 700; font-size: 11.5px; letter-spacing: 0.04em; color: #fff; }
.v2docs .ep .method.GET { background: #10b981; }
.v2docs .ep .path { font-weight: 500; color: var(--v2-fg); }
.v2docs .ep .path span.var { color: var(--v2-accent); }

/* Two-column endpoint block */
.v2docs .split { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 28px; align-items: start; }
@media (max-width: 980px) { .v2docs .split { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }
.v2docs .split .left p:first-child { margin-top: 0; }

/* Code blocks */
.v2docs pre.code, .v2docs .code-card pre { background: var(--v2-code-bg); color: var(--v2-code-fg); padding: 16px 18px; border-radius: 10px; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.55; overflow-x: auto; margin: 0; }
.v2docs .code-card { background: var(--v2-code-bg); border-radius: 10px; overflow: hidden; }
.v2docs .code-card .code-head { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 10px 14px; border-bottom: 1px solid #1e293b; color: var(--v2-code-muted); font-size: 12px; font-family: ui-monospace, monospace; }
.v2docs .code-card .code-head .lang { color: #94a3b8; }
.v2docs .code-card .code-head .tab { padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 4px; background: #1e293b; color: #c7d2fe; font-weight: 500; }

.v2docs code { font-family: ui-monospace, 'JetBrains Mono', SFMono-Regular, monospace; background: #f1f5f9; color: #4f46e5; padding: 1px 6px; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 0.88em; }
.v2docs pre code { background: transparent; color: inherit; padding: 0; font-size: inherit; }

/* JSON syntax classes */
.v2docs .j-key { color: var(--v2-code-key); }
.v2docs .j-str { color: var(--v2-code-str); }
.v2docs .j-num { color: var(--v2-code-num); }
.v2docs .j-bool { color: #fca5a5; }
.v2docs .j-null { color: #94a3b8; font-style: italic; }
.v2docs .j-c { color: var(--v2-code-comment); font-style: italic; }

/* Param table */
.v2docs table.params { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; font-size: 14px; margin: 8px 0 0; }
.v2docs table.params th, .v2docs table.params td { padding: 10px 12px; text-align: left; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--v2-border); vertical-align: top; }
.v2docs table.params th { font-size: 12px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; color: var(--v2-muted); font-weight: 600; }
.v2docs table.params td:first-child { font-family: ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 13px; color: #4f46e5; white-space: nowrap; }
.v2docs table.params td:nth-child(2) { color: var(--v2-muted); font-size: 12px; }

/* Why cards */
.v2docs .why-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); gap: 16px; }
@media (max-width: 760px) { .v2docs .why-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }
.v2docs .why-card { background: #fff; border: 1px solid var(--v2-border); border-radius: 10px; padding: 20px; }
.v2docs .why-card .num { width: 28px; height: 28px; border-radius: 7px; background: #eef2ff; color: var(--v2-accent); display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-weight: 700; font-size: 13px; margin-bottom: 10px; }
.v2docs .why-card h3 { margin: 0 0 6px; font-size: 15px; }
.v2docs .why-card p { color: var(--v2-muted); font-size: 14px; margin: 0; }

.v2docs .pill { display: inline-block; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 999px; background: #f1f5f9; color: #475569; font-size: 11.5px; font-weight: 500; }

/* Banner */
.v2docs .banner { background: linear-gradient(120deg, #0b1020 0%, #1e1b4b 100%); color: #fff; border-radius: 12px; padding: 24px 28px; margin-bottom: 36px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 18px; }
.v2docs .banner .b-text { flex: 1; font-size: 14px; color: #cbd5e1; }
.v2docs .banner .b-text strong { color: #fff; }
.v2docs .banner .b-actions a { display: inline-block; padding: 8px 14px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2); color: #fff; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; }
.v2docs .banner .b-actions a:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.18); }
</style>


    <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.2/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css" rel="stylesheet">
    <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap-icons@1.11.1/font/bootstrap-icons.css" rel="stylesheet">
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <style>
        :root {
            --primary: #2563eb;
            --primary-dark: #1d4ed8;
            --primary-light: #3b82f6;
            --success: #10b981;
            --warning: #f59e0b;
            --danger: #ef4444;
            --gray-50: #f9fafb;
            --gray-100: #f3f4f6;
            --gray-200: #e5e7eb;
            --gray-300: #d1d5db;
            --gray-400: #9ca3af;
            --gray-500: #6b7280;
            --gray-600: #4b5563;
            --gray-700: #374151;
            --gray-800: #1f2937;
            --gray-900: #111827;
            --radius-sm: 0.375rem;
            --radius-md: 0.5rem;
            --radius-lg: 0.75rem;
            --radius-xl: 1rem;
            --shadow-sm: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05);
            --shadow: 0 1px 3px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1), 0 1px 2px -1px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1);
            --shadow-md: 0 4px 6px -1px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1), 0 2px 4px -2px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1);
            --shadow-lg: 0 10px 15px -3px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1), 0 4px 6px -4px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1);
        }

        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        body {
            font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
            background: var(--gray-50);
            color: var(--gray-900);
            line-height: 1.6;
            min-height: 100vh;
        }

        /* Navbar */
        .navbar {
            background: white;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--gray-200);
            padding: 0.75rem 0;
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
        }

        .navbar-brand {
            font-weight: 800;
            font-size: 1.5rem;
            color: var(--gray-900) !important;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 0.5rem;
        }

        .navbar-brand .logo-icon {
            width: 36px;
            height: 36px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary), var(--primary-dark));
            border-radius: var(--radius-md);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            color: white;
            font-size: 1.25rem;
        }

        .nav-link {
            color: var(--gray-600) !important;
            font-weight: 500;
            font-size: 0.9rem;
            padding: 0.5rem 1rem !important;
            border-radius: var(--radius-md);
            transition: all 0.2s;
        }

        .nav-link:hover, .nav-link.active {
            color: var(--primary) !important;
            background: var(--gray-100);
        }

        .nav-link.nav-link-featured {
            color: #fff !important;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #16a34a 0%, #15803d 100%);
            font-weight: 700;
            box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(22,163,74,.35);
        }
        .nav-link.nav-link-featured:hover {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #15803d 0%, #14532d 100%);
            color: #fff !important;
            transform: translateY(-1px);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(22,163,74,.45);
        }
        .nav-link.nav-link-featured .badge-new {
            background: #fbbf24; color: #78350f;
            font-size: 0.6rem; font-weight: 800;
            padding: 0.1rem 0.35rem; border-radius: 4px;
            margin-left: 0.3rem; vertical-align: middle;
        }

        /* ===== Sport pills (top row) ===== */
        .nav-link.sport-pill {
            position: relative;
            padding: 0.5rem 0.85rem !important;
        }
        .nav-link.sport-pill.active {
            color: var(--pill-accent) !important;
            background: transparent;
            font-weight: 600;
        }
        .nav-link.sport-pill.active::after {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            left: 0.85rem; right: 0.85rem; bottom: 0.2rem;
            height: 2px;
            background: var(--pill-accent);
            border-radius: 1px;
        }
        .nav-link.sport-pill.sport-football.active { --pill-accent: #16a34a; }
        .nav-link.sport-pill.sport-tennis.active   { --pill-accent: #d97706; }
        .nav-link.sport-pill.sport-csgo.active     { --pill-accent: #1d4ed8; }
        .nav-link.sport-pill.sport-darts.active    { --pill-accent: #dc2626; }
        .nav-link.sport-pill.sport-hockey.active   { --pill-accent: #0891b2; }
        .nav-link.sport-pill.sport-basketball.active { --pill-accent: #ea580c; }

        .nav-divider {
            width: 1px;
            height: 22px;
            background: var(--gray-200);
            margin: 0 0.4rem;
            list-style: none;
        }

        /* ===== Per-sport sub-nav (second row) ===== */
        .bsd-subnav {
            background: var(--gray-50);
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--gray-200);
            padding: 0.5rem 0;
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            position: sticky;
            top: 64px;
            z-index: 1029;
        }
        .bsd-subnav .container {
            gap: 0.2rem;
        }
        .bsd-subnav a {
            color: var(--gray-600);
            text-decoration: none;
            padding: 0.35rem 0.85rem;
            border-radius: var(--radius-md);
            font-weight: 500;
            transition: all 0.15s;
            white-space: nowrap;
        }
        .bsd-subnav a:hover {
            color: var(--gray-900, #111);
            background: white;
        }
        .bsd-subnav a.active {
            color: var(--sub-accent);
            background: white;
            box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);
            font-weight: 600;
        }
        .bsd-subnav__cta {
            color: #dc2626 !important;
            font-weight: 600 !important;
        }
        .bsd-subnav__cta:hover {
            background: #fef2f2 !important;
            color: #b91c1c !important;
        }

        .bsd-subnav--football { --sub-accent: #16a34a; }
        .bsd-subnav--tennis   { --sub-accent: #d97706; }
        .bsd-subnav--csgo     { --sub-accent: #1d4ed8; }
        .bsd-subnav--darts    { --sub-accent: #dc2626; }
        .bsd-subnav--hockey   { --sub-accent: #0891b2; }
        .bsd-subnav--basketball { --sub-accent: #ea580c; }

        /* Visual divider inside the sub-nav */
        .bsd-subnav .bsd-subnav__sep {
            display: inline-block;
            width: 1px;
            height: 18px;
            background: var(--gray-300);
            margin: 0 0.45rem;
            vertical-align: middle;
        }
        /* Navbar must float above the sticky sub-nav so its dropdowns aren't clipped */
        .navbar.sticky-top { z-index: 1040; }
        .navbar .dropdown-menu { z-index: 1050; }
        .bsd-subnav { z-index: 1029; }

        /* Cards */
        .card {
            background: white;
            border: 1px solid var(--gray-200);
            border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
            overflow: hidden;
            transition: all 0.2s;
        }

        .card:hover {
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-md);
        }

        .card-header {
            background: var(--gray-50);
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--gray-200);
            padding: 1rem 1.25rem;
            font-weight: 600;
            color: var(--gray-800);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 0.5rem;
        }

        .card-body {
            padding: 1.25rem;
        }

        /* Tables */
        .table {
            color: var(--gray-800);
            margin-bottom: 0;
        }

        .table thead th {
            background: var(--gray-50);
            color: var(--gray-600);
            font-weight: 600;
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.05em;
            border-bottom: 2px solid var(--gray-200);
            padding: 0.75rem 1rem;
        }

        .table tbody td {
            padding: 0.875rem 1rem;
            border-color: var(--gray-100);
            vertical-align: middle;
        }

        .table-hover tbody tr:hover {
            background: var(--gray-50);
        }

        /* Forms */
        .form-control, .form-select {
            border: 1px solid var(--gray-300);
            border-radius: var(--radius-md);
            padding: 0.625rem 1rem;
            font-size: 0.9rem;
            transition: all 0.2s;
        }

        .form-control:focus, .form-select:focus {
            border-color: var(--primary);
            box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.1);
        }

        /* Buttons */
        .btn {
            font-weight: 500;
            padding: 0.625rem 1.25rem;
            border-radius: var(--radius-md);
            transition: all 0.2s;
        }

        .btn-primary {
            background: var(--primary);
            border-color: var(--primary);
        }

        .btn-primary:hover {
            background: var(--primary-dark);
            border-color: var(--primary-dark);
        }

        .btn-outline-primary {
            color: var(--primary);
            border-color: var(--primary);
        }

        .btn-outline-primary:hover {
            background: var(--primary);
            color: white;
        }

        /* Badges */
        .badge {
            font-weight: 500;
            padding: 0.35rem 0.65rem;
            border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
        }

        /* Breadcrumbs */
        .breadcrumb-nav {
            background: white;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--gray-200);
            padding: 0.5rem 0;
            font-size: 0.85rem;
        }
        .breadcrumb-nav .breadcrumb {
            margin-bottom: 0;
        }
        .breadcrumb-nav .breadcrumb-item a {
            color: var(--primary);
            text-decoration: none;
        }
        .breadcrumb-nav .breadcrumb-item.active {
            color: var(--gray-500);
        }

        /* Footer */
        .footer {
            background: var(--gray-900);
            color: var(--gray-400);
            padding: 3rem 0 2rem;
            margin-top: 4rem;
        }

        .footer a {
            color: var(--gray-400);
            text-decoration: none;
            transition: color 0.2s;
        }

        .footer a:hover {
            color: white;
        }

        .footer h6 {
            color: white;
            font-weight: 600;
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.05em;
            margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
        }

        .footer ul {
            list-style: none;
            padding: 0;
            margin: 0;
        }

        .footer ul li {
            margin-bottom: 0.35rem;
        }

        .footer ul li a {
            font-size: 0.9rem;
        }

        .footer-bottom {
            border-top: 1px solid var(--gray-700);
            padding-top: 1.5rem;
            margin-top: 2rem;
        }

        /* Animations */
        @keyframes fadeIn {
            from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(10px); }
            to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
        }

        .fade-in {
            animation: fadeIn 0.3s ease-out forwards;
        }

        /* Responsive */
        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            .hero h1 { font-size: 1.75rem; }
        }
    </style>

    <style>
        #discord-banner {
            display: none;
            position: relative;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, #5865F2 0%, #7289DA 50%, #5865F2 100%);
            background-size: 200% 100%;

            letter-spacing: 0.01em;
            box-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(88,101,242,0.45);
            z-index: 1100;
        }
        #discord-banner .dot {

<!-- ── Main ── -->
<main class="v2-main">

    <h1 class="hero">API v2 <span class="hero-tag">Stable</span></h1>
    <p class="hero-sub">Streamlined event endpoints. Smaller payloads, structured types, predictable shapes.</p>

    <div class="banner">
        <div class="b-text">
            <strong>v1 still works.</strong> Existing integrations against <code style="color:#fff;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.1)">/api/events/</code> keep working unchanged. Migrate when convenient — there is no deprecation date.
        </div>
        <div class="b-actions"><a href="/docs/">v1 docs</a></div>
    </div>

    <!-- ── Why v2 ── -->
    <section id="why">
        <h2>Why v2?</h2>
        <p class="lead">v1 grew organically into a single fat detail endpoint. v2 fixes the friction points integrators reported.</p>

        <div class="why-grid">
            <div class="why-card">
                <div class="num">1</div>
                <h3>One endpoint per concern</h3>
                <p>Core info, stats, incidents, odds, lineups, metadata are split into focused sub-resources. Fetch only what you need.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="why-card">
                <div class="num">2</div>
                <h3>Predictable types</h3>
                <p>Ratio stats are structured: <code>{"value": 2, "total": 14, "pct": 14}</code> instead of the string <code>"2/14 (14)"</code>. No more client-side parsing.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="why-card">
                <div class="num">3</div>
                <h3>Booleans are booleans</h3>
                <p>v1 fields like <code>is_neutral_ground</code> could be <code>true</code>, <code>false</code>, or <code>null</code> — three states for two outcomes. v2 collapses to two.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="why-card">
                <div class="num">4</div>
                <h3>Decoded enums</h3>
                <p>Weather codes are decoded for you: each detail response carries a <code>description</code> alongside the numeric <code>code</code>.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="why-card">
                <div class="num">5</div>
                <h3>Stable IDs</h3>
                <p>Internal primary keys everywhere — including incidents (<code>player_id</code>, <code>player_in_id</code>, <code>player_out_id</code>). No juggling between two ID spaces.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="why-card">
                <div class="num">6</div>
                <h3>Enriched stats</h3>
                <p>Per-side stats merge ball-tracking metrics (<code>attack</code>, <code>ball_safe</code>, <code>dangerous_attack</code>) with traditional stats and add computed <code>pass_accuracy_pct</code>.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="why-card">
                <div class="num">7</div>
                <h3>Better metadata</h3>
                <p>New fields you didn't have before: derby, neutral-ground, travel distance, pitch condition, weather, attendance, jerseys, pre-match facts.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="why-card">
                <div class="num">8</div>
                <h3>Live-only fields cleaned up</h3>
                <p>Finished matches no longer leak in-progress flags. <code>is_live</code> is always <code>false</code> on ended events; the <code>added_time: 999</code> sentinel is gone.</p>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- ── Auth ── -->
    <section id="auth">
        <h2>Authentication</h2>
        <div class="split">
            <div class="left">
                <p>Every request needs an API token. Send it in the <code>Authorization</code> header. Get a free token by registering on the BSD landing page.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="right">
                <div class="code-card">
                    <div class="code-head"><span class="tab">Header</span><span class="lang">http</span></div>
<pre class="code"><span class="j-key">Authorization</span>: Token <span class="j-str">YOUR_API_KEY</span></pre>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- ── Base ── -->
    <section id="base">
        <h2>Base URL</h2>
        <div class="split">
            <div class="left">
                <p>All v2 endpoints live under one path. Examples below show full URLs; everything else in this page is relative to it.</p>
                <p>Prefer Postman? Download the <a href="/static/bsd-api-v2.postman_collection.json">v2 Postman collection</a> (35 requests across 7 folders) — set the <code>token</code> variable to your API key and you're set. Or import the <a href="/api/schema/?format=json">OpenAPI schema</a> directly.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="right">
                <div class="code-card">
                    <div class="code-head"><span class="tab">URL</span><span class="lang"></span></div>
<pre class="code">https://sports.bzzoiro.com/api/v2/</pre>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- ── Live WebSocket ── -->
    <section id="live-websocket">
        <h2>Live WebSocket <span class="hero-tag" style="background:#fef3c7;color:#92400e;">Add-on · $3/mo</span></h2>
        <p class="lead">Real-time push stream for matches in progress. Full protocol, frame schemas, pricing and activation live on the dedicated page.</p>
        <p><a href="/websocket/" class="btn btn-warning text-dark fw-semibold"><i class="bi bi-broadcast me-1"></i> Open the Live WebSocket page →</a></p>
    </section>

    <!-- ── List ── -->
    <section id="list">
        <h2>List events</h2>
        <p class="lead">Paginated list of events. Each item has the same shape as the detail endpoint.</p>
        <div class="ep"><span class="method GET">GET</span><span class="path">/api/v2/events/</span></div>

        <div class="split">
            <div class="left">
                <h4>Query parameters</h4>
                <table class="params">
                    <thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th></tr></thead>
                    <tbody>
                        <tr><td>league_id</td><td>int</td><td>Filter by league</td></tr>
                        <tr><td>status</td><td>str</td><td>notstarted, inprogress, finished, …</td></tr>
                        <tr><td>date_from</td><td>str</td><td>YYYY-MM-DD or ISO (UTC)</td></tr>
                        <tr><td>date_to</td><td>str</td><td>YYYY-MM-DD or ISO (UTC)</td></tr>
                        <tr><td>limit</td><td>int</td><td>Page size, default 50, max 200</td></tr>
                        <tr><td>offset</td><td>int</td><td>Page offset</td></tr>
                    </tbody>
                </table>
            </div>
            <div class="right">
                <div class="code-card" style="margin-bottom:12px;">
                    <div class="code-head"><span class="tab">Request</span><span class="lang">curl</span></div>
<pre class="code">curl -H <span class="j-str">"Authorization: Token $TOKEN"</span> \
  <span class="j-str">"https://sports.bzzoiro.com/api/v2/events/?league_id=49&status=finished&limit=5"</span></pre>
                </div>
                <div class="code-card">
                    <div class="code-head"><span class="tab">Response</span><span class="lang">json</span></div>
<pre class="code">{
  <span class="j-key">"count"</span>: <span class="j-num">92</span>,
  <span class="j-key">"next"</span>: <span class="j-str">"…?limit=5&offset=5"</span>,
  <span class="j-key">"previous"</span>: <span class="j-null">null</span>,
  <span class="j-key">"results"</span>: [ <span class="j-c">/* event objects */</span> ]
}</pre>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- ── Live window ── -->
    <section id="live">
        <h2>Live window</h2>
        <p class="lead">Lightweight list of events in their <em>live window</em> — from <code>event_date − 5 min</code> through <code>~10 min after final whistle</code>. Built for high-frequency polling by livetracker dashboards. <strong>Cached in Redis with TTL 30 s</strong>; do not poll faster than that.</p>
        <div class="ep"><span class="method GET">GET</span><span class="path">/api/v2/events/live/</span></div>

        <div class="split">
            <div class="left">
                <h4>Query parameters</h4>
                <table class="params">
                    <thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th></tr></thead>
                    <tbody>
                        <tr><td>league_id</td><td>int</td><td>Filter by league.</td></tr>
                        <tr><td>season_id</td><td>int</td><td>Filter by season.</td></tr>
                        <tr><td>team_id</td><td>int</td><td>Matches where the team played home or away.</td></tr>
                    </tbody>
                </table>
                <p style="font-size:13px;color:var(--v2-muted);margin-top:8px;">Other params (<code>status</code>, <code>date_from</code>, <code>date_to</code>, <code>limit</code>, <code>offset</code>) are ignored — the window is fixed and the response is never paginated.</p>

                <h4 style="margin-top:24px;">Response shape</h4>
                <p>No <code>next</code>/<code>previous</code> and no time-window object — the result is always the full live set (typically 0–80 events worldwide). Each item carries a <code>last_updated</code> timestamp so clients can short-circuit polls when the row hasn't changed.</p>

                <h4 style="margin-top:24px;">Item schema</h4>
                <p>Item is intentionally narrow. Heavy fields (<code>weather</code>, <code>pitch_condition</code>, <code>attendance</code>, <code>is_local_derby</code>, <code>is_neutral_ground</code>, <code>travel_distance_km</code>, <code>referee_id</code>, <code>venue_id</code>, coaches, <code>round_number</code>, <code>penalty_shootout</code>) are NOT included — fetch them from <code>/api/v2/events/{id}/</code> when needed.</p>
                <ul style="font-size:13.5px;">
                    <li><code>status</code>: <code>notstarted</code> | <code>inprogress</code> | <code>penalties</code> | <code>finished</code></li>
                    <li><code>period</code>: <code>1st_half</code> | <code>halftime</code> | <code>2nd_half</code> | <code>extra_time</code> | <code>FT</code> | <code>null</code> — <code>null</code> when status is <code>notstarted</code> or <code>penalties</code></li>
                    <li><code>current_minute</code>: int or <code>null</code> (non-null only for <code>inprogress</code> and <code>penalties</code>)</li>
                    <li><code>home_score_ht</code>/<code>away_score_ht</code>: int or <code>null</code></li>
                    <li><code>live_websocket</code>: <code>true</code> when the event is wired to <code>/ws/live/</code></li>
                    <li><code>last_updated</code>: ISO-8601 UTC with <code>Z</code> suffix — the row's <code>updated_at</code></li>
                    <li><code>event_date</code>: ISO-8601 UTC with literal <code>Z</code> suffix</li>
                </ul>
            </div>
            <div class="right">
                <div class="code-card" style="margin-bottom:12px;">
                    <div class="code-head"><span class="tab">Request</span><span class="lang">curl</span></div>
<pre class="code">curl -H <span class="j-str">"Authorization: Token $TOKEN"</span> \
  <span class="j-str">"https://sports.bzzoiro.com/api/v2/events/live/?league_id=49"</span></pre>
                </div>
                <div class="code-card">
                    <div class="code-head"><span class="tab">Response</span><span class="lang">json</span></div>
<pre class="code">{
  <span class="j-key">"count"</span>: <span class="j-num">5</span>,
  <span class="j-key">"events"</span>: [
    {
      <span class="j-key">"id"</span>: <span class="j-num">204863</span>,
      <span class="j-key">"league_id"</span>: <span class="j-num">49</span>,
      <span class="j-key">"league_name"</span>: <span class="j-str">"J1 League"</span>,
      <span class="j-key">"home_team_id"</span>: <span class="j-num">1943</span>,
      <span class="j-key">"home_team"</span>: <span class="j-str">"Shimizu S-Pulse"</span>,
      <span class="j-key">"away_team_id"</span>: <span class="j-num">1938</span>,
      <span class="j-key">"away_team"</span>: <span class="j-str">"Cerezo Osaka"</span>,
      <span class="j-key">"event_date"</span>: <span class="j-str">"2026-05-06T04:00:00Z"</span>,
      <span class="j-key">"status"</span>: <span class="j-str">"penalties"</span>,
      <span class="j-key">"period"</span>: <span class="j-null">null</span>,
      <span class="j-key">"current_minute"</span>: <span class="j-num">8</span>,
      <span class="j-key">"home_score"</span>: <span class="j-num">1</span>,
      <span class="j-key">"away_score"</span>: <span class="j-num">1</span>,
      <span class="j-key">"home_score_ht"</span>: <span class="j-num">0</span>,
      <span class="j-key">"away_score_ht"</span>: <span class="j-num">1</span>,
      <span class="j-key">"live_websocket"</span>: <span class="j-num">true</span>,
      <span class="j-key">"last_updated"</span>: <span class="j-str">"2026-05-06T04:32:11Z"</span>
    }
  ]
}</pre>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- ── Detail ── -->
    <section id="detail">
        <h2>Event detail</h2>
        <p class="lead">Lightweight core fields for one event. Foreign keys are exposed as IDs only.</p>
        <div class="ep"><span class="method GET">GET</span><span class="path">/api/v2/events/<span class="var">{id}</span>/</span></div>

        <div class="split">
            <div class="left">
                <p>Use this endpoint to power match cards and headers. Sub-resources (stats, incidents, lineups …) load on demand.</p>
                <p><code>home_team</code> and <code>away_team</code> ship alongside the IDs as a convenience for the most common UI use case — display the match name without an extra request.</p>

    <!-- ── Stats ── -->
    <section id="stats">
        <h2>Stats</h2>
        <p class="lead">All quantitative metrics: per-team stats, shotmap, momentum, average pitch positions, per-minute xG.</p>
        <div class="ep"><span class="method GET">GET</span><span class="path">/api/v2/events/<span class="var">{id}</span>/stats/</span></div>

        <div class="split">
            <div class="left">
                <p>Per-team stats merge traditional counters, ball-tracking metrics, and computed values like <code>pass_accuracy_pct</code>.</p>
                <p>Ratio stats use the structured shape; pure counters and percentages stay as plain integers. See <a href="#shapes">stat shapes</a>.</p>
                <h4>Top-level keys</h4>
                <table class="params">
                    <tbody>
                        <tr><td>stats.home / stats.away</td><td>obj</td><td>Per-side merged metrics</td></tr>
                        <tr><td>shotmap</td><td>list</td><td>Per-shot xG, coords, body part, situation</td></tr>
                        <tr><td>momentum</td><td>list</td><td>Per-minute pressure index</td></tr>
                        <tr><td>average_positions</td><td>obj</td><td>Average pitch positions per player</td></tr>
                        <tr><td>xg_per_minute</td><td>list</td><td>xG buckets and cumulative totals</td></tr>
                    </tbody>
                </table>
            </div>
            <div class="right">
                <div class="code-card">
                    <div class="code-head"><span class="tab">Response (excerpt)</span><span class="lang">json</span></div>
<pre class="code">{

      <span class="j-key">"long_balls"</span>:{ <span class="j-key">"value"</span>: <span class="j-num">25</span>, <span class="j-key">"total"</span>: <span class="j-num">52</span>,  <span class="j-key">"pct"</span>: <span class="j-num">48</span> },

  },

            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- ── Incidents ── -->
    <section id="incidents">
        <h2>Incidents</h2>
        <p class="lead">Chronological match events: goals, cards, substitutions, period markers, VAR decisions, injury time.</p>
        <div class="ep"><span class="method GET">GET</span><span class="path">/api/v2/events/<span class="var">{id}</span>/incidents/</span></div>

        <div class="split">
            <div class="left">
                <p>Every <code>*_id</code> field is a BSD primary key — use it directly with other endpoints. On finished events <code>is_live</code> is always <code>false</code>.</p>
                <h4>Common types</h4>
                <table class="params">

                        <tr><td>card</td><td></td><td>card_type: yellow / red / yellowRed</td></tr>
                        <tr><td>substitution</td><td></td><td>player_in / player_out</td></tr>
                        <tr><td>period</td><td></td><td>1st half, HT, 2nd half, FT</td></tr>
                        <tr><td>injuryTime</td><td></td><td>Stoppage announcement</td></tr>
                        <tr><td>varDecision</td><td></td><td>Decision class + confirmed flag</td></tr>
                    </tbody>

            </div>

    <!-- ── Odds ── -->
    <section id="odds">

                <h4>Markets</h4>

                        <tr><td>1X2</td><td></td><td>home_win / draw / away_win</td></tr>

    <!-- ── Metadata ── -->
    <section id="metadata">
        <h2>Metadata</h2>
        <p class="lead">Non-statistical context: jerseys, pre-match facts, AI-generated preview text.</p>
        <div class="ep"><span class="method GET">GET</span><span class="path">/api/v2/events/<span class="var">{id}</span>/metadata/</span></div>

        <div class="split">
            <div class="left">
                <p>Pre-match facts are short narrative sentences (e.g. "Bayern haven't lost in 19 games"). The AI preview is a Twitter-style hype writeup generated for fixtures kicking off in the next 24 hours.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="right">
                <div class="code-card">
                    <div class="code-head"><span class="tab">Response</span><span class="lang">json</span></div>
<pre class="code">{

  <span class="j-key">"jerseys"</span>: {

    <span class="j-key">"away"</span>: { <span class="j-c">/* … */</span> }
  },
  <span class="j-key">"funfacts"</span>: [
    {
      <span class="j-key">"type_id"</span>: <span class="j-num">2</span>,

    }

  }
}</pre>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- ── Lineups ── -->
    <section id="lineups">
        <h2>Lineups</h2>
        <p class="lead">Unified endpoint covering AI-predicted lineups, official confirmed XIs, and the no-data case via a single discriminator.</p>
        <div class="ep"><span class="method GET">GET</span><span class="path">/api/v2/events/<span class="var">{id}</span>/lineups/</span></div>

        <div class="split">
            <div class="left">
                <p>One endpoint, three states — read <code>lineup_status</code> to know what you got:</p>
                <ul>
                    <li><strong><code>confirmed</code></strong> — official XI published by the club. Available ~1 hour before kickoff and persists after the match. <code>confidence</code> and <code>ai_score</code> are <code>null</code>.</li>
                    <li><strong><code>predicted</code></strong> — AI-generated lineup with <code>confidence</code> (per side) and per-player <code>ai_score</code>, both as floats <code>0–1</code> rounded to four decimals. Only served for matches that have not started yet. <code>beta: true</code> appears only in this state.</li>
                    <li><strong><code>unavailable</code></strong> — no lineup data yet. <code>lineups</code>, <code>unavailable_players</code> and <code>updated_at</code> are <code>null</code>. The response is still <code>200</code>, never <code>404</code>.</li>
                </ul>
                <p>Selection priority: confirmed > predicted > unavailable. Live and finished matches never receive predicted, even if predictions exist in the database — at that point the answer is either confirmed (if we have the official XI) or unavailable.</p>
                <p><code>updated_at</code> is ISO 8601 UTC ending in <code>Z</code> (e.g. <code>2026-04-19T06:00:00Z</code>).</p>
            </div>
            <div class="right">
                <div class="code-card">
                    <div class="code-head"><span class="tab">Response — predicted</span><span class="lang">json</span></div>
<pre class="code">{

  <span class="j-key">"lineups"</span>: {
    <span class="j-key">"home"</span>: {

      <span class="j-key">"team_name"</span>: <span class="j-str">"Barcelona"</span>,
      <span class="j-key">"formation"</span>: <span class="j-str">"4-3-3"</span>,
      <span class="j-key">"confidence"</span>: <span class="j-num">0.74</span>,
      <span class="j-key">"players"</span>: [
        {
          <span class="j-key">"id"</span>: <span class="j-num">1234</span>,
          <span class="j-key">"name"</span>: <span class="j-str">"I. Pena"</span>,
          <span class="j-key">"short_name"</span>: <span class="j-str">"I. Pena"</span>,
          <span class="j-key">"position"</span>: <span class="j-str">"G"</span>,
          <span class="j-key">"jersey_number"</span>: <span class="j-num">13</span>,
          <span class="j-key">"ai_score"</span>: <span class="j-num">0.91</span>
        }
      ],
      <span class="j-key">"substitutes"</span>: [ <span class="j-c">/* same shape */</span> ]
    },
    <span class="j-key">"away"</span>: { <span class="j-c">/* same shape */</span> }
  },
  <span class="j-key">"unavailable_players"</span>: {
    <span class="j-key">"home"</span>: [
      {
        <span class="j-key">"id"</span>: <span class="j-num">9012</span>,

  },

}</pre>
                </div>
                <div class="code-card" style="margin-top:12px;">
                    <div class="code-head"><span class="tab">Response — unavailable</span><span class="lang">json</span></div>
<pre class="code">{

    <!-- ── Event player stats ── -->

    <h2 style="margin-top:48px;">Leagues</h2>
    <p class="hero-sub" style="margin-bottom:0;">A football competition. Lightweight detail plus seasons and standings sub-resources.</p>

    <!-- ── Leagues list ── -->
    <section id="leagues-list">
        <h2>List leagues</h2>
        <p class="lead">Paginated list of leagues. Filter by country and women/men.</p>
        <div class="ep"><span class="method GET">GET</span><span class="path">/api/v2/leagues/</span></div>

        <div class="split">
            <div class="left">
                <h4>Query parameters</h4>
                <table class="params">
                    <thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th></tr></thead>
                    <tbody>
                        <tr><td>country</td><td>str</td><td>Filter by country (case-insensitive)</td></tr>
                        <tr><td>is_women</td><td>bool</td><td>Default: both</td></tr>
                        <tr><td>is_active</td><td>bool</td><td>Default: only active</td></tr>
                        <tr><td>limit</td><td>int</td><td>Page size, default 50, max 200</td></tr>

    <h2 style="margin-top:48px;">Odds</h2>
    <p class="hero-sub" style="margin-bottom:0;">Multi-bookmaker odds (~15 books, including the synthetic <code>oddssafari-consensus</code>). The standalone <code>/api/v2/events/{id}/odds/</code> consensus endpoint is unchanged. This section adds the rest of the odds universe: a global list, detail, best-upcoming, side-by-side comparison, Polymarket, and the bookmakers index.</p>

    <!-- ── Odds list ── -->
    <section id="odds-list">
        <h2>List odds</h2>
        <p class="lead">Paginated list of latest odds — one row per <code>(event, bookmaker, market, outcome)</code> tuple at its most recent observation. Cached 3 min.</p>
        <div class="ep"><span class="method GET">GET</span><span class="path">/api/v2/odds/</span></div>
        <div class="split">
            <div class="left">
                <h4>Query parameters</h4>
                <table class="params">
                    <thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th></tr></thead>
                    <tbody>
                        <tr><td>event_id / league_id / season_id / team_id</td><td>int</td><td>Standard event-scope filters.</td></tr>
                        <tr><td>bookmaker_slug</td><td>str</td><td>Slug only (e.g. <code>pinnacle</code>). Display names rejected with 400.</td></tr>
                        <tr><td>market</td><td>enum</td><td>1x2, btts, over_under_15, over_under_25, over_under_35, double_chance, draw_no_bet.</td></tr>
                        <tr><td>outcome</td><td>enum</td><td>HOME, DRAW, AWAY, over, under, yes, no, 1X, 12, X2.</td></tr>
                        <tr><td>min_decimal_odds / max_decimal_odds</td><td>float</td><td>Bounds on price.</td></tr>
                        <tr><td>movement</td><td>enum</td><td>SHORTENING | DRIFTING.</td></tr>
                        <tr><td>is_max_quote</td><td>bool</td><td>Source flagged the row as best price across books.</td></tr>
                        <tr><td>updated_after</td><td>str</td><td>ISO-8601 UTC. Only odds with <code>observed_at</code> ≥ this.</td></tr>
                        <tr><td>limit / offset</td><td>int</td><td>Standard pagination.</td></tr>
                    </tbody>
                </table>
                <p style="font-size:13px;color:var(--v2-muted);margin-top:8px;">Incoherent <code>market+outcome</code> combinations return <strong>400</strong>: e.g. <code>?market=btts&outcome=HOME</code> → "Outcome 'HOME' is not valid for market 'btts'. Valid outcomes: yes, no.".</p>
            </div>
            <div class="right">
                <div class="code-card">

        <div class="ep"><span class="method GET">GET</span><span class="path">/api/v2/odds/best/</span></div>

                <h4>Query parameters</h4>

    <!-- ── Odds comparison by event ── -->
    <section id="odds-comparison">
        <h2>Comparison (by event)</h2>
        <p class="lead">All bookmakers side-by-side for one event. <strong>Outcome keys are codes</strong> (HOME/DRAW/AWAY/over/under/...), not team names — stable parsing even when teams are renamed. Bookmaker keys are slugs. <code>outcome_name</code> still appears inside each outcome for legibility. Cached 3 min.</p>
        <div class="ep"><span class="method GET">GET</span><span class="path">/api/v2/events/<span class="var">{id}</span>/odds/comparison/</span></div>
        <p style="font-size:13px;color:var(--v2-muted);">Event found but with no odds yet → <code>200</code> with <code>{"markets": {}}</code>. Unknown event → <code>404</code>.</p>
    </section>

    <!-- ── Polymarket by event ── -->
    <section id="odds-polymarket">
        <h2>Polymarket (by event)</h2>
        <p class="lead">Polymarket prediction-market prices for one event. Prices are implied probabilities (0–1); decimal odds = <code>1/price</code>. Distinct shape from traditional odds. Cached 1 min.</p>
        <div class="ep"><span class="method GET">GET</span><span class="path">/api/v2/events/<span class="var">{id}</span>/polymarket/</span></div>
        <p style="font-size:13px;color:var(--v2-muted);">Event with no Polymarket coverage → <code>404</code> with body <code>{"detail": "No Polymarket markets available for this event."}</code>.</p>
    </section>

    <!-- ── Bookmakers list ── -->
    <section id="odds-bookmakers">
        <h2>Bookmakers</h2>
        <p class="lead">All active bookmakers as <code>{slug, name}</code>. No detail, no pagination. Cached 1 hour.</p>
        <div class="ep"><span class="method GET">GET</span><span class="path">/api/v2/bookmakers/</span></div>
        <p style="font-size:13px;color:var(--v2-muted);"><code>oddssafari-consensus</code> is a synthetic average across the rest, not a real bookmaker.</p>
    </section>

    <h2 style="margin-top:48px;">Predictions</h2>
    <p class="hero-sub" style="margin-bottom:0;">CatBoost ML predictions, restructured: response is grouped by market (match_result, expected_goals, over_under, btts, score) instead of v1's flat shape. The embedded event is a slim summary, not the full event detail.</p>

    <!-- ── Predictions list ── -->
    <section id="predictions-list">
        <h2>List predictions</h2>
        <p class="lead">Paginated list of predictions for football matches. Cached in Redis for 120 s.</p>
        <div class="ep"><span class="method GET">GET</span><span class="path">/api/v2/predictions/</span></div>
        <div class="split">
            <div class="left">
                <h4>Query parameters</h4>
                <table class="params">
                    <thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th></tr></thead>
                    <tbody>
                        <tr><td>status</td><td>enum</td><td><code>upcoming</code> (default) | <code>past</code> | <code>all</code>. Ignored when <code>date_from</code>/<code>date_to</code> is set — the explicit window wins.</td></tr>
                        <tr><td>league_id</td><td>int</td><td>Filter by league.</td></tr>
                        <tr><td>season_id</td><td>int</td><td>Filter by season.</td></tr>
                        <tr><td>team_id</td><td>int</td><td>Predictions where the team played home or away.</td></tr>
                        <tr><td>date_from / date_to</td><td>str</td><td>ISO-8601 UTC, or <code>YYYY-MM-DD</code>.</td></tr>
                        <tr><td>min_confidence</td><td>float</td><td>0–1. Lower bound on model confidence.</td></tr>
                        <tr><td>recommended</td><td>bool</td><td><code>true</code> = at least one <code>*_recommend</code> is true. <code>false</code> = all false. Omit to skip filter.</td></tr>

  <span class="j-key">"account"</span>: { <span class="j-key">"handle"</span>: <span class="j-str">"@granadacf"</span>, <span class="j-key">"name"</span>: <span class="j-str">"Granada CF"</span>, <span class="j-key">"verified"</span>: <span class="j-num">true</span> },
  <span class="j-key">"published_at"</span>: <span class="j-str">"2026-04-12T19:32:00Z"</span>,
  <span class="j-key">"linked"</span>: {
    <span class="j-key">"teams"</span>: [{ <span class="j-key">"id"</span>: <span class="j-num">44</span>, <span class="j-key">"name"</span>: <span class="j-str">"Granada CF"</span> }],
    <span class="j-key">"events"</span>: [{ <span class="j-key">"id"</span>: <span class="j-num">580</span>, <span class="j-key">"home_team"</span>: <span class="j-str">"Granada"</span>, <span class="j-key">"away_team"</span>: <span class="j-str">"Sevilla"</span>, <span class="j-key">"event_date"</span>: <span class="j-str">"2026-04-12T17:30:00Z"</span> }],
    <span class="j-key">"players"</span>: [],
    <span class="j-key">"managers"</span>: []
  }
}</pre>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- ── Social detail ── -->
    <section id="social-detail">
        <h2>Social detail</h2>
        <p class="lead">Same shape as a list item. Unknown id → <code>404</code>. News items return <code>404</code> in v2.</p>
        <div class="ep"><span class="method GET">GET</span><span class="path">/api/v2/social/<span class="var">{id}</span>/</span></div>
    </section>

    <!-- ── By team ── -->
    <section id="social-by-team">
        <h2>By team</h2>
        <p class="lead">Paginated social items linked to one team. Same item shape as <code>/social/</code>.</p>
        <div class="ep"><span class="method GET">GET</span><span class="path">/api/v2/teams/<span class="var">{id}</span>/social/</span></div>
        <p style="font-size:13px;color:var(--v2-muted);">Filters: <code>type</code>, <code>published_after</code>, <code>published_before</code>, <code>account_verified</code>, <code>limit</code>, <code>offset</code>.</p>
    </section>

    <!-- ── By event ── -->
    <section id="social-by-event">
        <h2>By event</h2>
        <p class="lead">Paginated social items linked to one event. Temporal filters omitted — the event already bounds the window.</p>
        <div class="ep"><span class="method GET">GET</span><span class="path">/api/v2/events/<span class="var">{id}</span>/social/</span></div>
    </section>

    <!-- ── By player ── -->
    <section id="social-by-player">
        <h2>By player</h2>
        <p class="lead">Paginated social items mentioning one player. <strong>Heuristic</strong> linking — false positives possible.</p>
        <div class="ep"><span class="method GET">GET</span><span class="path">/api/v2/players/<span class="var">{id}</span>/social/</span></div>
    </section>

    <!-- ── By manager ── -->
    <section id="social-by-manager">
        <h2>By manager</h2>
        <p class="lead">Paginated social items linked to one manager.</p>
        <div class="ep"><span class="method GET">GET</span><span class="path">/api/v2/managers/<span class="var">{id}</span>/social/</span></div>
    </section>

    <!-- ── Weather codes ── -->
    <section id="weather">
        <h2>Weather codes</h2>
        <p class="lead">The <code>weather.code</code> field uses this dictionary. <code>weather.description</code> is the same mapping pre-decoded for clients that only need the label.</p>
        <table class="params" style="max-width:520px;">
            <thead><tr><th>Code</th><th>Description</th></tr></thead>
            <tbody>
                <tr><td>0</td><td>unknown / closed venue</td></tr>
                <tr><td>1</td><td>clear</td></tr>
                <tr><td>2</td><td>cloudy</td></tr>
                <tr><td>3</td><td>rain</td></tr>
                <tr><td>4</td><td>snow</td></tr>
                <tr><td>5</td><td>extreme</td></tr>
            </tbody>
        </table>
    </section>

    <!-- ── Stat shapes ── -->
    <section id="shapes">
        <h2>Stat shapes</h2>
        <p class="lead">Three shapes appear inside <code>stats.home</code> / <code>stats.away</code>:</p>

        <div class="split">
            <div class="left">
                <h4>Counter</h4>
                <p>Plain integer counter. Example: <code>"total_shots": 11</code></p>

                <h4>Percentage</h4>
                <p>Plain integer 0–100. Example: <code>"ball_possession": 56</code></p>

                <h4>Ratio</h4>
                <p>Object with successful count, attempts, and the rounded percentage.</p>
                <p>Stats currently using the ratio shape:</p>
                <p><span class="pill">crosses</span> <span class="pill">dribbles</span> <span class="pill">long_balls</span> <span class="pill">aerial_duels</span> <span class="pill">ground_duels</span> <span class="pill">final_third_phase</span></p>
            </div>
            <div class="right">
                <div class="code-card">
                    <div class="code-head"><span class="tab">Ratio shape</span><span class="lang">json</span></div>
<pre class="code">{
  <span class="j-key">"value"</span>: <span class="j-num">2</span>,    <span class="j-c">// successful</span>
  <span class="j-key">"total"</span>: <span class="j-num">14</span>,   <span class="j-c">// attempts</span>
  <span class="j-key">"pct"</span>:   <span class="j-num">14</span>    <span class="j-c">// rounded percentage</span>
}</pre>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- ── Migration ── -->
    <section id="migration">
        <h2>Migration from v1</h2>
        <p class="lead">Equivalence map and a recommended loading strategy.</p>

        <h4>Field mapping</h4>
        <table class="params">
            <thead><tr><th>v1</th><th>v2</th></tr></thead>
            <tbody>
                <tr><td>GET /api/events/{id}/?full=true</td><td></td><td>Multiple calls — one per sub-resource</td></tr>
                <tr><td>league (object)</td><td></td><td>league_id</td></tr>
                <tr><td>home_team_obj (object)</td><td></td><td>home_team_id + home_team</td></tr>
                <tr><td>referee (object)</td><td></td><td>referee_id → /api/referees/?name=…</td></tr>
                <tr><td>weather_code, wind_speed, …</td><td></td><td>weather.{code,description,wind_speed,temperature_c}</td></tr>
                <tr><td>is_neutral_ground may be null</td><td></td><td>always boolean</td></tr>
                <tr><td>live_stats.home.crosses = "2/14 (14)"</td><td></td><td>stats.home.crosses = {value,total,pct}</td></tr>
                <tr><td>shotmap, momentum (on detail)</td><td></td><td>under /events/{id}/stats/</td></tr>
                <tr><td>lineups (on detail)</td><td></td><td>/events/{id}/lineups/</td></tr>
                <tr><td>incidents (on detail)</td><td></td><td>/events/{id}/incidents/</td></tr>
                <tr><td>odds_home, odds_over_25, …</td><td></td><td>/events/{id}/odds/ → odds.{home_win,over_25_goals,…}</td></tr>
                <tr><td>incident player_id = upstream id</td><td></td><td>incident player_id = BSD primary key</td></tr>
                <tr><td>/api/teams/?…</td><td></td><td>/api/v2/teams/?country_code=&league_id=&in_competition=</td></tr>
                <tr><td>/api/players/?…</td><td></td><td>/api/v2/players/?team_id=&nationality_code=&position=</td></tr>
                <tr><td>/api/managers/?…</td><td></td><td>/api/v2/managers/?team_id=&tactical_profile=&team_style=</td></tr>
                <tr><td>/api/referees/ (un-paginated)</td><td></td><td>/api/v2/referees/ (paginated, with detail + matches sub-resources)</td></tr>
                <tr><td>/api/worldcup/venues/</td><td></td><td>/api/v2/leagues/{wc_league_id}/seasons/{season_id}/venues/?round=…</td></tr>
                <tr><td>/api/predictions/?upcoming=true</td><td></td><td>/api/v2/predictions/?status=upcoming</td></tr>
                <tr><td>/api/predictions/?upcoming=false</td><td></td><td>/api/v2/predictions/?status=past</td></tr>
                <tr><td>/api/predictions/?league=X</td><td></td><td>/api/v2/predictions/?league_id=X</td></tr>
                <tr><td>/api/predictions/?tz=…</td><td></td><td>not supported — UTC (Z) only</td></tr>
                <tr><td>prob_home_win / prob_draw / prob_away_win</td><td></td><td>markets.match_result.{prob_home, prob_draw, prob_away}</td></tr>
                <tr><td>predicted_result</td><td></td><td>markets.match_result.predicted (enum H/D/A)</td></tr>
                <tr><td>expected_home_goals / expected_away_goals</td><td></td><td>markets.expected_goals.{home, away}</td></tr>
                <tr><td>prob_over_15 / prob_over_25 / prob_over_35</td><td></td><td>markets.over_under.prob_over_{15,25,35}</td></tr>
                <tr><td>prob_btts_yes</td><td></td><td>markets.btts.prob_yes</td></tr>
                <tr><td>most_likely_score</td><td></td><td>markets.score.most_likely</td></tr>
                <tr><td>favorite (string)</td><td></td><td>recommendations.favorite (H/A/null)</td></tr>
                <tr><td>favorite_prob</td><td></td><td>recommendations.favorite_prob</td></tr>
                <tr><td>favorite_recommend (bool)</td><td></td><td>recommendations.bet_favorite (renamed to avoid collision with the favorite string sibling)</td></tr>
                <tr><td>over_15_recommend / over_25_recommend / over_35_recommend</td><td></td><td>recommendations.{over_15, over_25, over_35}</td></tr>
                <tr><td>btts_recommend</td><td></td><td>recommendations.btts</td></tr>
                <tr><td>winner_recommend</td><td></td><td>recommendations.winner</td></tr>
                <tr><td>confidence</td><td></td><td>model.confidence (always normalized to 0–1)</td></tr>
                <tr><td>model_version</td><td></td><td>model.version</td></tr>
                <tr><td>event (full object)</td><td></td><td>event (slim summary: id + teams + league + date + status)</td></tr>
                <tr><td>/api/odds/?event=X</td><td></td><td>/api/v2/odds/?event_id=X (paginated, no envelope)</td></tr>
                <tr><td>/api/odds/?event=X (envelope)</td><td></td><td>/api/v2/events/{id}/odds/comparison/</td></tr>
                <tr><td>/api/odds/?bookmaker=Pinnacle</td><td></td><td>/api/v2/odds/?bookmaker_slug=pinnacle (slug only — display name returns 400)</td></tr>
                <tr><td>/api/odds/?league=X</td><td></td><td>/api/v2/odds/?league_id=X</td></tr>
                <tr><td>/api/odds/ default market=1x2</td><td></td><td>/api/v2/odds/ default = all markets</td></tr>
                <tr><td>silent empty for incoherent market+outcome</td><td></td><td>400 with explicit detail message</td></tr>
                <tr><td>/api/odds/{id}/ event-id fallback</td><td></td><td>/api/v2/odds/{id}/ — strict 404 if not an odds row</td></tr>
                <tr><td>/api/odds/best/?days=N</td><td></td><td>/api/v2/odds/best/?date_from=...&date_to=... (default 7 d)</td></tr>
                <tr><td>/api/odds/compare/?event=X</td><td></td><td>/api/v2/events/{X}/odds/comparison/</td></tr>
                <tr><td>compare keys = team names</td><td></td><td>compare keys = outcome codes (HOME/DRAW/AWAY); <code>outcome_name</code> stays</td></tr>
                <tr><td>/api/odds/bookmakers/</td><td></td><td>/api/v2/bookmakers/</td></tr>
                <tr><td>/api/odds/polymarket/?event=X</td><td></td><td>/api/v2/events/{X}/polymarket/ — own shape, <code>volume_usd</code>/<code>liquidity_usd</code> not exposed (data not stored)</td></tr>
                <tr><td>/api/tv-channels/?country=X</td><td></td><td>/api/v2/tv-channels/?country_code=X (ISO-2)</td></tr>
                <tr><td>/api/tv-channels/?search=X</td><td></td><td>/api/v2/tv-channels/?name=X</td></tr>
                <tr><td>tv-channel response: <code>is_official</code></td><td></td><td>removed (always true, redundant)</td></tr>
                <tr><td>tv-channel response: upstream <code>channel_id</code></td><td></td><td>removed from public response</td></tr>
                <tr><td>/api/broadcasts/?event=X</td><td></td><td>/api/v2/broadcasts/?event_id=X</td></tr>
                <tr><td>/api/broadcasts/?country=X</td><td></td><td>/api/v2/broadcasts/?country_code=X (ISO-2)</td></tr>
                <tr><td>/api/broadcasts/?channel=X</td><td></td><td>/api/v2/broadcasts/?channel_id=X — <strong>internal</strong> TVChannel PK (v1 used upstream id)</td></tr>
                <tr><td>/api/broadcasts/?league=X</td><td></td><td>/api/v2/broadcasts/?league_id=X</td></tr>
                <tr><td>broadcasts response: only <code>home_team</code>/<code>away_team</code> labels</td><td></td><td>adds <code>home_team_id</code>, <code>away_team_id</code>, <code>league_id</code> (id+label pattern)</td></tr>
                <tr><td>broadcasts: no pagination</td><td></td><td>standard <code>limit</code>/<code>offset</code> wrapper, plus a detail endpoint</td></tr>
                <tr><td>/api/predicted-lineup/{id}/</td><td></td><td>/api/v2/events/{id}/lineups/ — check <code>lineup_status == "predicted"</code></td></tr>
                <tr><td>predicted lineup <code>404</code> when not generated</td><td></td><td>/api/v2/events/{id}/lineups/ — <code>200</code> with <code>lineup_status: "unavailable"</code></td></tr>
                <tr><td>predicted <code>beta: true</code> flag</td><td></td><td>top-level <code>beta</code> field, <code>true</code> only when <code>lineup_status == "predicted"</code></td></tr>
                <tr><td>predicted <code>confidence</code> 0–100</td><td></td><td>0–1, four decimals</td></tr>
                <tr><td>predicted <code>ai_score</code> 0–100 per player</td><td></td><td>0–1, four decimals</td></tr>
                <tr><td>predicted <code>predicted_formation</code></td><td></td><td><code>lineups.{home,away}.formation</code></td></tr>
                <tr><td>predicted <code>starters</code></td><td></td><td><code>lineups.{home,away}.players</code></td></tr>
                <tr><td>predicted <code>bench</code></td><td></td><td><code>lineups.{home,away}.substitutes</code></td></tr>
                <tr><td>broadcasts for one event</td><td></td><td>/api/v2/events/{id}/broadcasts/ (sub-resource)</td></tr>
                <tr><td>broadcasts for one channel</td><td></td><td>/api/v2/tv-channels/{id}/broadcasts/ (sub-resource)</td></tr>
                <tr><td>/api/social/?team=X / event=X / player=X / manager=X</td><td></td><td>/api/v2/social/?team_id=X / event_id=X / player_id=X / manager_id=X</td></tr>
                <tr><td>/api/social/?since=X</td><td></td><td>/api/v2/social/?published_after=X (ISO-8601 UTC)</td></tr>
                <tr><td>social response: <code>source</code></td><td></td><td>removed (vendor name no longer exposed)</td></tr>
                <tr><td>social response: <code>media_urls</code></td><td></td><td><code>media</code> normalized: <code>[{type, url, width, height}]</code></td></tr>
                <tr><td>social response: <code>account_handle</code> / <code>account_name</code> / <code>account_verified</code></td><td></td><td>grouped under <code>account.{handle, name, verified}</code></td></tr>
                <tr><td>social response: <code>teams</code> / <code>events</code> / <code>players</code> / <code>managers</code> arrays</td><td></td><td>grouped under <code>linked.{teams, events, players, managers}</code></td></tr>
                <tr><td>social <code>news</code> items</td><td></td><td>excluded from v2 (only <code>tweet</code> + <code>video</code>)</td></tr>
                <tr><td>social embedded in /events/{id}/ or /teams/{id}/ detail</td><td></td><td>not embedded (was never embedded in v2; use the new <code>/<entity>/{id}/social/</code> sub-resources)</td></tr>
            </tbody>
        </table>

        <h3>Recommended loading strategy</h3>
        <p>Don't fetch everything upfront. Load detail first, defer sub-resources to user actions:</p>
        <table class="params">
            <thead><tr><th>UI surface</th><th>Endpoint</th></tr></thead>
            <tbody>
                <tr><td>Match list view</td><td><code>/events/?…</code></td><td>~1 KB per row</td></tr>
                <tr><td>Match summary card</td><td><code>/events/{id}/</code></td><td>core fields</td></tr>
                <tr><td>Stats tab</td><td><code>/events/{id}/stats/</code></td><td>per-team + analytics</td></tr>
                <tr><td>Timeline tab</td><td><code>/events/{id}/incidents/</code></td><td>chronological events</td></tr>
                <tr><td>Lineups tab</td><td><code>/events/{id}/lineups/</code></td><td>XI + subs + injuries</td></tr>
                <tr><td>Player ratings tab</td><td><code>/events/{id}/player-stats/</code></td><td>per-player rating + box score</td></tr>
                <tr><td>Team page</td><td><code>/teams/{id}/</code> + <code>/teams/{id}/squad/</code> + <code>/teams/{id}/fixtures/</code></td><td>parallel fetch</td></tr>
                <tr><td>Player page</td><td><code>/players/{id}/</code> + <code>/players/{id}/career/</code></td><td>defer transfers/national-team to a tab</td></tr>
                <tr><td>Manager page</td><td><code>/managers/{id}/</code> + <code>/managers/{id}/career/</code></td><td>aggregates already on detail</td></tr>
            </tbody>
        </table>
    </section>

  // Highlight the current section in the sidebar as you scroll
  (function () {
    const links = document.querySelectorAll('.v2docs .v2-side a');
    const sections = [...links].map(a => document.querySelector(a.getAttribute('href'))).filter(Boolean);
    function onScroll() {
      const y = window.scrollY + 120;
      let active = sections[0];
      for (const s of sections) { if (s.offsetTop <= y) active = s; }
      links.forEach(a => a.classList.toggle('is-active', a.getAttribute('href') === '#' + active.id));
    }
    window.addEventListener('scroll', onScroll, { passive: true });
    onScroll();
  })();

      },
      {
        name: 'get_live_scores',

<!-- Global navbar search -->
<script>
(function(){
    const input = document.getElementById('globalSearch');
    const box = document.getElementById('searchResults');
    if (!input || !box) return;
    let timer = null;
    const typeIcons = {team:'bi-shield-fill',player:'bi-person-fill',league:'bi-trophy-fill'};
    const typeColors = {team:'#2563eb',player:'#22c55e',league:'#f59e0b'};

    input.addEventListener('input', function(){
        clearTimeout(timer);
        const q = this.value.trim();
        if (q.length < 2) { box.style.display='none'; return; }
        timer = setTimeout(()=>{
            fetch('/search/?q='+encodeURIComponent(q))
            .then(r=>r.json())
            .then(data=>{
                if (!data.results.length) {
                    box.innerHTML='<div class="p-3 text-muted small">No results found</div>';
                    box.style.display='block'; return;
                }
                box.innerHTML = data.results.map(r=>`
                    <a href="${r.url}" class="d-flex align-items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 text-decoration-none border-bottom" style="color:#111;">
                        ${r.img ? `<img src="${r.img}" width="28" height="28" style="object-fit:${r.type==='team'?'contain':'cover'};border-radius:${r.type==='player'?'50%':'4px'};" onerror="this.style.display='none'">` : `<i class="bi ${typeIcons[r.type]||'bi-search'}" style="color:${typeColors[r.type]||'#999'};font-size:1.2rem;width:28px;text-align:center;"></i>`}
                        <div>
                            <div class="fw-semibold small">${r.name}</div>
                            <div class="text-muted" style="font-size:0.7rem;">${r.type.charAt(0).toUpperCase()+r.type.slice(1)}${r.extra?' · '+r.extra:''}</div>
                        </div>
                    </a>
                `).join('');
                box.style.display='block';
            });
        }, 250);
    });

    document.addEventListener('click', function(e){
        if (!input.contains(e.target) && !box.contains(e.target)) box.style.display='none';
    });
    input.addEventListener('focus', function(){ if(box.innerHTML && this.value.length>=2) box.style.display='block'; });
})();
</script>
